panels.title: Active Routes
panels.description: Routes with an online feature update in the last 10 minutes

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT route_id) AS value FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ON (route_id) route_id, updated_at FROM online_route_features ORDER BY route_id, updated_at DESC) t WHERE updated_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '10 minutes'

panels.title: Anomalous Routes Now
panels.description: Routes flagged is_anomaly = true in their latest window

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ON (route_id) route_id, is_anomaly, updated_at FROM online_route_features ORDER BY route_id, updated_at DESC) t WHERE updated_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '10 minutes' AND is_anomaly = true

panels.title: p95 Ingestion Lag
panels.description: p95 end-to-end lag from API ingest_ts to Postgres write. SLO: < 20 000 ms

targets.rawSql: SELECT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY last_ingest_lag_ms) AS value FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ON (route_id) last_ingest_lag_ms FROM online_route_features WHERE updated_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '10 minutes' AND last_ingest_lag_ms IS NOT NULL ORDER BY route_id, updated_at DESC) t

SELECT PERCENTILE_CONT(0.50) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY last_ingest_lag_ms) AS value FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ON (route_id) last_ingest_lag_ms FROM online_route_features WHERE updated_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '10 minutes' AND last_ingest_lag_ms IS NOT NULL ORDER BY route_id, updated_at DESC) t

panels.title: Total Observations (current hour)
panels.description: Sum of observation_count across all routes in current window

targets.rawSql: SELECT SUM(observation_count) AS value FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ON (route_id) observation_count FROM online_route_features ORDER BY route_id, updated_at DESC) t

panels.title: Ingestion-to-Feature Latency Over Time
panels.description: p50 and p95 lag per minute. Flat line below 20 000 ms = SLO met.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('minute', updated_at) AS time,
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.50) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY last_ingest_lag_ms) AS p50_ms,
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY last_ingest_lag_ms) AS p95_ms
FROM online_route_features
WHERE $__timeFilter(updated_at)
  AND last_ingest_lag_ms IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Anomalous Routes Over Time
panels.description: Number of routes with is_anomaly=true per minute

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('minute', updated_at) AS time,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE is_anomaly = true)  AS anomalous,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE is_anomaly = false) AS normal
FROM (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (route_id, DATE_TRUNC('minute', updated_at))
    route_id, updated_at, is_anomaly
  FROM online_route_features
  WHERE $__timeFilter(updated_at)
  ORDER BY route_id, DATE_TRUNC('minute', updated_at), updated_at DESC
) t
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Current Online Features — All Routes
panels.description: Latest feature window per route. Auto-refreshes every 10s. Red rows = anomaly detected by Faust z-score.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  route_id,
  window_start AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS window_start,
  updated_at   AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS last_updated,
  observation_count,
  ROUND(mean_duration_minutes::numeric, 2)   AS mean_duration_min,
  ROUND(stddev_duration_minutes::numeric, 2) AS stddev_duration_min,
  ROUND(last_duration_minutes::numeric, 2)   AS last_duration_min,
  ROUND(mean_heavy_ratio::numeric, 4)        AS mean_heavy_ratio,
  ROUND(duration_zscore::numeric, 3)         AS zscore,
  is_anomaly,
  last_ingest_lag_ms                         AS lag_ms
FROM (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (route_id) *
  FROM online_route_features
  ORDER BY route_id, updated_at DESC
) t
ORDER BY ABS(COALESCE(duration_zscore, 0)) DESC

panels.title: Z-Score Distribution Over Time (top anomalous routes)
panels.description: Tracks duration z-score for routes with |zscore| > 2 in the last hour. Crossing ±3 triggers is_anomaly.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  updated_at AS time,
  route_id,
  duration_zscore
FROM online_route_features
WHERE $__timeFilter(updated_at)
  AND ABS(duration_zscore) > 2
ORDER BY updated_at
